projects.title: Rental Marketplace
projects.excerpt: A full-stack rental marketplace with hybrid semantic search, Stripe payments, and JWT-based authentication built with FastAPI and React.
projects.description:
A full-stack rental marketplace built with **FastAPI** and **React** featuring JWT-based authentication, role-based authorization, listing management, booking workflows, and payment processing.

### Features
- Hybrid semantic search engine with PostgreSQL FTS, pgvector (HNSW), OpenAI embeddings, and PostGIS
- Stripe Payments integration with server-side payment verification via secure webhook processing
- Rate limiting, caching, and automated integration testing using Testcontainers

### Technologies
Python, TypeScript, FastAPI, React.js, PostgreSQL, PostGIS, Cloudinary, Stripe, Redis

projects.title: College ERP
projects.excerpt: A full-stack ERP platform supporting academic, administrative, and user management workflows with OCR-powered registration.
projects.description:
A full-stack ERP platform built using Python, Sanic, and PostgreSQL supporting academic, administrative, and user management workflows.

### Features
- Automated leave management, fee payment, and receipt generation workflows
- OCR-powered student registration using Aadhaar and marksheet extraction
- Reduced manual processing by 60% and onboarding time by 70%

### Technologies
Python, Sanic, React.js, PostgreSQL, MinIO

projects.title: Task Management API
projects.excerpt: A task management REST API in Go using Echo and PostgreSQL with New Relic APM and comprehensive test coverage.
projects.description:
A task management REST API built in Go using Echo and PostgreSQL, supporting CRUD operations, filtering, pagination, and full-text search.

### Features
- New Relic APM integration, structured logging, and distributed tracing
- Comprehensive unit and integration tests across API, service, and repository layers

### Technologies
Golang, Echo, PostgreSQL, Clerk, New Relic

projects.title: Django-CryptographicFields
projects.excerpt: A cryptographic field package for Django ORM with 65K+ downloads on PyPI.
projects.description:
A cryptographic field package for Django ORM that provides transparent encryption/decryption at the field level.

### Features
- Transparent field-level encryption for Django models
- Easy integration with existing Django projects

### Technologies
Python, Django, Cryptography
